text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I head over to the cafeteria for dinner<n>and notice a
crowd. In the middle of<n>the rabble is...

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Huh?! Oh, you're the trainer from<n>before! ☆ Yo, yo,
yo! ♪

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
I was just sharing pictures from the<n>pajama party
with everyone!

text_block_list.name: Miho Dorm Resident
text_block_list.text:
Just hearing about the party is so<n>much fun! Ugh, I
wish I was in Ritto<n>Dorm too!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Huh? What's stopping ya?! You<n>should just pop
on by! We'll have<n>another bash with everyone
here!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: A party...

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Hey, Rice! You should come to the<n>party too!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Oh, um, no... I can't... I'll bring bad<n>luck if I go...

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Bad luck?! No cap?! No way, are we<n>talking, like,
urban legends and—

text_block_list.name: Miho Dorm Resident
text_block_list.text:
Oh! Helios! Look out! There's a<n>banana peel at
your fe—

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Slip! THUD!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Owwww, I slipped on a banana peel!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Oh no... I-I'm so sorry! I knew it... It's<n>all my fault!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: What? Wait, this is what youmeant? Like, for real for real?That's so... so...

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: So cool! I'm totally gagged!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Huh?! C-c-c-cool?!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: That's literally a superpower!What's gonna happen next?! I'm sohyped!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
N-no, it's not a good thing! I'm sure<n>that whatever
happens next will be<n>even worse...

text_block_list.name: Kitchen Equipe
text_block_list.text: Ah, I slipped! My bucket! Watch<n>oooout!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Fwooooosh!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Yikes! There's a bucket comin' at<n>me!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Yikes! There's a bucket comin' at<n>me!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Wooooo! Say less!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Swish... Splooooosh!

text_block_list.name: Students
text_block_list.text: Whoa! Nice dodge, Helios!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Wow... Y-you're incredible...

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe! I know, right?! When it comes<n>to running
away, I'm next level. ☆

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: But for real, you totally need tocome to our party! It'll be a total ragerwith you there!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
D-do you really mean that? Is it okay<n>for me to
come?
choice_data_list: Helios will be there too, so I'm sure it'll be fine.
Helios will be there too, so I'm sure it'll be fine.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Yes yes yes! Leave it to me! Woo!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Ehehe... W-woo!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Thoink! SPLOOOOOSH!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Gah, I botched that so bad! Now I'm<n>soaked!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I-I-I'm so sorry! I knew it... I'mjust plain—

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Hilarious! I'm weak!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: ...What?

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Talk about a drip! OMG, this is justlike a summer festival!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
U-um... Y-you're soaking wet... but<n>you're not
mad?

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Mad?! I'm totes vibing! Like, imagine<n>if we did this
at a party. It would be so<n>fire!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
So c'mon, join me and the gang at<n>our place!
Legit though, I'd be super<n>stocked!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Gosh... O-okay! I'd be stoked as well!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Wooooo! Going in for the catch!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Swoosh... Doink!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Gah! I caught it with my face!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Awww, I'm so, so sorry! See,having me at the party is a bad idea...

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Why?! Unexpected things like theseare fire! I'll make sure I catch itnext time!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Wait! Why don't we do this at the<n>party?! It would
totally be lit! ☆

text_block_list.name: Students
text_block_list.text:
OMG, I totally see it! We could even<n>prep other fun
stuff too!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Um, are... are you sure? You really<n>don't mind my
bad luck?

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Nope, sure don't! We're like, totally<n>on the same
wavelength! This<n>party's gonna be a total rager!
You<n>with me?!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: O-okay! I'm with you!
